shofer.description: The best free models to get started

landing.introduction: With a range of built-in and extensible Modes, Shofer lets you plan, architect, code, debug and boost your productivity like never before.

providerSignup.heading: Choose your provider
providerSignup.chooseProvider: Shofer needs an LLM provider to work. Choose one to get started, you can add more later.
providerSignup.rooCloudDescription: The easiest way to start is with the Shofer Router: a curated mix of free and paid models at a low cost.
providerSignup.useAnotherProviderDescription: Enter an API key and get going.
providerSignup.noApiKeys: Don't want to deal with API keys and separate accounts?

waitingForCloud.heading: Logging into Shofer Cloud...
waitingForCloud.description: We'll take you to your browser to sign up for Shofer Cloud. We'll then bring you back here to finish.
waitingForCloud.noPrompt: If you don't get prompted to open a URL, <clickHere>click here</clickHere>.
waitingForCloud.havingTrouble: If you've completed sign up but are having trouble, <clickHere>click here</clickHere>.
waitingForCloud.pasteUrl: Paste the callback URL shown in your browser:
waitingForCloud.invalidURL: That doesn't look like a valid callback URL. Please copy what Shofer Cloud is showing in your browser.

startRouter: We recommend using an LLM Router:
startCustom: Or you can bring your provider API key:

telemetry.helpImproveMessage: Shofer collects error and usage data to help us fix bugs and improve the extension. This telemetry does not collect code, prompts or personal information. You can turn this off in <settingsLink>settings</settingsLink>.
